name: Yellow Tomato Sauce
recipeIngredient: 6 lb Yellow Tomatoes, peeled and seeded, cut into chunks (may use red tomatoes)
1 Epazote leaf (a pungent herb), finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a stainless steel saucepan, sauté the diced onion in olive oil until soft.
2. Add minced garlic and sauté briefly.
3. Add the tomato chunks, tomato paste, chipotle chiles, and epazote.
4. Simmer for 15 minutes.
5. Stir in chopped cilantro and season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. If desired, puree the sauce for a smoother texture.
Makes approximately 2 quarts (about 8 servings).
Sauce may be refrigerated up to two weeks or frozen for up to six months.
